I'm happy to share that I am starting my summer internship with Duke Energy in the IT sector. 

I'm looking forward to applying my technical skills in a real world environment, learning how emerging technology, including Artificial Intelligence, is driving customer experiences at scale, and contributing to initiatives that serve millions of customers. I am grateful for the opportunity to learn from industry leaders, collaborate with talented teams, and better understand how technology, data, and AI can create meaningful impact in the utility and energy sector. 

Thank you to everyone at Duke Energy, Andrew Cairrikier , Liz Escobar, CISSP , and Suresh U. , for this opportunity. Looking forward to making the most of this opportunity this summer! #DukeEnergy #PurdueUniversity #ComputerScience #ArtificialIntelligence
